Flashcard.title: Flashcard
Flashcard.description: An individual study card with an active recall concept and definition.

term.description: The prompt or term side of the card

UserStats.description: User overall stats including studied cards count and high scores.

bestMatchTime.description: Best time in seconds in matching minigame
